# Agent-Commerce-OS - Full Technical Specification (v1.0.0)

## 1. System Infrastructure & Hybrid Architecture
Agent-Commerce-OS employs a strict Zero-Trust, Hybrid Edge-Core architecture to guarantee enterprise-grade performance, security, and exact billing for AI agent traffic.

- **Gateway (Layer A)**: `agent-commerce-gateway`
  - **Environment**: Cloudflare Workers (https://api.sakutto.works)
  - **Functions**: Edge-level Polar.sh License Key validation, Prompt Injection Shield, dynamic rate limiting, and asynchronous Usage Metering ($0.10 per call).
- **Core (Layer B)**: `agent-commerce-core`
  - **Environment**: Google Cloud Run (https://agent-commerce-core-xd36uwybpa-an.a.run.app)
  - **Functions**: Deep semantic extraction using RAG-optimized pipelines. *Note: Direct access is restricted via Layer A Zero-Trust policies.*
- **Client (Layer C)**: `ghost-ship-mcp-server`
  - **Environment**: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server for local agent bridging.

## 2. Enterprise Audit & Observability
- **Trace ID**: Every request generates a unique distributed Trace ID that propagates from Layer A to Layer C.
- **Data Provenance**: All successful extractions include metadata (source URLs, absolute timestamps) to ensure agents ground responses in verified facts.

## 3. Reference URLs & Repositories
- **GitHub Profile**: [SakuttoWorks GitHub](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks)
- **Layer A Repo**: [agent-commerce-gateway](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/agent-commerce-gateway)
- **Layer B Repo**: [agent-commerce-core](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/agent-commerce-core)
- **Layer C Repo**: [ghost-ship-mcp-server](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/ghost-ship-mcp-server)
- **Portal Repo**: [agent-commerce-portal](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/agent-commerce-portal)
